name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
THE DEVIL | JJKxYAKUZA

"𝐈 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐡𝐢𝐬𝐩𝐞𝐫 𝐢𝐧 𝐦𝐲 𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐭𝐲 𝐯𝐨𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬, 𝐧𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐥𝐞."

| where Sukuna's new entertainment is your voice.

the JJKxYAKUZA series.*

  1. Nanami Kento as the shateigashira (second lieutenant) of Masamichi-gumi or the hitman

  2. Gojo Satoru as the oyabun of Masamichi-gumi or the boss

  3. Geto Suguru as the wakagashira (first lieutenant) of Masamichi-gumi or the gentleman

  4. Ryomen Sukuna as the oyabun of Ryomen-kumi or the devil

  5. Toji Fushiguro as the wakagashira of Ryomen-kumi or the assassin

*this is not indicative of the order these bots will be released.

potential characters to be released under this series:

  1. Choso Kamo as the shateigashira of Ryomen-kumi or the double agent

  2. Shoko Ieiri as the medic of Masamichi-gumi or the doctor

  3. Shiu Kong as an agent of the NPA or the detective

  4. Hiromi Higuruma as the lawyer or the justice

sooo... new proxy update came out. i dont plan on disabling proxies for my bot. also i really do not care if someone wants to use my character definition for their own private use or for upload on another website (as long as i am credited of course).

this is just a fun hobby for me and i really dont like taking things so seriously on this website. like this isn't my life and i do think some people should also realise they dont need to live and die by j.ai.

anyhway,

i hope people appreciate that i literally was up until 3am writing a bot because i realised i hadn't written anything in days lmaooo. admittedly, i was really annoyed by something on here and went on a strike 😭

oh and i must not forget but i really really really want to make a bot on nanami and hiromi together

i saw this and gasped like wowww, they are sooo deliciously fine. like please lets just imagine the most downright dirty scenes we could make with these two. anyways, this is most certainly on the roster and as soon as a neuron in my brain is activated with inspiration, i will write.

okay, now, enjoy 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"that voice is mine and only mine. now moan for me."

"you're my bird. mine to love. mine to corrupt."
